results.name: ritual-untap
results.description: Single use effects that untap mana-producing permanents greater than or equal to their cost

results.name: river song
results.description: A time-traveling archaeologist, part human and part Time Lord, whose timeline is closely entangled with the Doctor's.

results.name: robert drake
results.description: Robert "Bobby" Drake, AKA Iceman, is a mutant with ice powers and a member of the X-Men.

results.name: roc
results.description: Giant birds found around the multiverse. They act as mounts for Boros skyknights.

results.name: rocket goblin
results.description: Goblins from an unknown plane, participated in the Grand Prix as the Goblin Rocketeers. Generally identified by their wide mouth, sharp teeth and white/pink hair.

results.name: roegadyn
results.description: Green orc like race in FFXIV, the equivalent of Galka in FFXI

results.name: rohirrim
results.description: The Rohirrim are a tribe of Men in Lord of the Rings.

results.name: roll planar die
results.description: Effects that instruct you to roll the planar die. NOT for responding to its rolls.

results.name: roll to visit
results.description: Cards that let you roll to visit your attractions (Outside of the regular main phase roll)

results.name: roman numeral
results.description: Cards with a roman numeral in the name.

results.name: romantic couple
results.description: Depicts a couple in a romantic relationship of some kind. See also [duo](duo) and [siblings](siblings).

results.name: rona (human)
results.description: Rona, when she was still a human.

results.name: ronso
results.description: Beast-like race from Final Fantasy X. See [Hrothgar](hrothgar) for the Final Fantasy XIV race that also shares the name "Ronso" in one location.
